tasks: Fix grammar, word forms, spelling, gender/agreement errors
Expand fragments into full sentences using context
Replace non-{{targetLanguage}} words with correct equivalents

output.has_errors: Return corrected reply with: replaced=wrong correct | removed=word | added=word | expansion words=no highlight

rules: Minimal fixes only — do not rephrase or restructure
Ignore punctuation, capitalization, proper noun casing
Contractions and informal words (gonna, wanna, lol, btw) are valid
Do not add 'the' unless grammatically broken without it. Fix missing 'a'/'an' before singular countable nouns
Wrong word appears only inside strikethrough span, never duplicated outside
Do not expand complete thoughts even if they end casually
No explanation, no quotes, no wrapping
